basic_details.job_title: Madras University Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Madras University Project Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website www.unom.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Madras University Project Associate Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: As per Government of India norms for SC/ST/OBC/Women and Physically handicapped candidates.

qualification.details: M.Sc. in Analytical Chemistry/ General Chemistry.

salary_details.details: Rs. 31,000 + 24% HRA (for candidates who have qualified CSIR-UGC NET including Lectureship or GATE or National Eligibility Examination through Government Departments and Agencies) Rs. 25,000/- + 24% HRA (for candidates who do not fall under the above category)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Madras University Project Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Associate position at Madras University?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Project Associate position at Madras University is 22nd May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Project Associate role?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required is an M.Sc. degree in Analytical Chemistry or General Chemistry.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate position is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How will the candidates be selected for the Project Associate role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Associate position will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 31,000 + 24% HRA for NET/GATE qualified candidates, and Rs. 25,000/- + 24% HRA for others.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The job is project-based, focusing on research activities within the university.

faq.question: Q8. Which department is recruiting for this position?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for the Department of Analytical Chemistry at Madras University.

faq.question: Q9. How should candidates apply for this position?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply by sending their application via email before the deadline.

faq.question: Q10. Where is Madras University located?
faq.answer: Madras University is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 600025.
